hooks.command: bash -c 'LAST_COMMIT=$(git log -1 --format=%ct 2>/dev/null); NOW=$(date +%s); if [ -n "$LAST_COMMIT" ] && [ $((NOW - LAST_COMMIT)) -lt 60 ] && [ -f ROADMAP.md ]; then UPDATED=$(stat -f "%Sm" -t "%Y-%m-%d" ROADMAP.md 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); echo "[Roadmap Nudge] ROADMAP.md last updated: $UPDATED. If this commit touches milestone work, update ROADMAP.md."; fi'
